---
title: "Meeting Slides"
---

## My Slides

This website contains the different slides I create for various meetings and presentations.
Slides are written in Quarto, and rendered as a website to GitHub Pages.

### Golden Lab Annual Reviews

- [Golden Lab Annual Review 2026](20260608-annual-review/golden_lab_annual_review.qmd)

### NSAPH 6-Month Check-Ins

- [NSAPH 6-Month Check-In 2026](20260624-nsaph-6-mo-checkin/nsaph-6-mo-checkin.qmd)
